page_settings.meta_description: Fuel your materials AI with ground-truth physical reality. Subscribe to the world’s highest-fidelity stream of standardized material synthesis and failure data.

layout_structure.layout: Left-aligned technical typography. Right side features a scrolling, syntax-highlighted terminal window streaming live data logs.

content.headline: Complement simulation with physical reality.
content.subheadline: Ground your internal AI models in thousands of physical, standardized data points. We provide the highest-fidelity, machine-readable training data for materials science, mapping both breakthroughs and invaluable synthesis failures.

layout_structure.layout: Three-column, code-aesthetic grid emphasizing technical rigor and data fidelity.

features.title: Structurally Unified
features.description: No more parsing fragmented PDFs or messy ELNs. Every run across our physical automated labs is logged into a strictly typed schema, ready for immediate ingestion into your data lakes.

features.title: The Negative Space
features.description: Algorithms learn faster from failure. We do not cherry-pick successes. Our dataset includes comprehensive logs of failed syntheses, anomalous degradation, and out-of-bounds reactions.

features.title: High-Fidelity Telemetry
features.description: We log far more than just the end material. Access microsecond-level telemetry, including vacuum pressures, precursor flow rates, plasma energies, and real-time metrology feedback.

layout_structure.layout: Full-width section featuring a dark-mode IDE mockup. Tabs to toggle between Endpoint (REST/GraphQL) and Payload (JSON).

content.body: Every API response delivers the complete lifecycle of a physical synthesis run, linking hardware parameters directly to structural metrology.

layout_structure.layout: Two-column pricing comparison card. Left: Academic/Startup. Right: Enterprise R&D.

tiers.name: Enterprise R&D
features: Full firehose access to the negative space database
Real-time WebSocket streaming from public lab nodes
Dedicated VPC peering and integration engineering

layout_structure.layout: Solid off-white block container inside clean viewport.

content.header: Ground your models in physical data.
content.body: Active learning and physical simulation thrive on high-quality empirical data. Connect to the Solbion database to train your algorithms on verified experimental loops.
